data.name: Chronicles of Ella: Whispers of Mythrillis
data.detailed_description:
A flower said to be only a myth.
A forest no one dares to enter.
Naturally—Ella went anyway.

Step into Chronicles of Ella, a darkly seductive Futanari visual novel where charm can be your sharpest weapon… or your undoing.
Flirt, deceive, or surrender—every choice changes how far you’ll go and who dares follow you into the dark.

Play as Ella, a clever, cocky, silver-tongued futa sent on a dangerous mission to retrieve a mythical flower.

  • 🌿 A cunning protagonist – Play as Ella, a silver-tongued wanderer who bends truth, lust, and loyalty to survive.

  • 💋 Dynamic relationships – Charm, provoke, or betray characters whose trust determines your fate.

  • 🔮 Multiple endings – Escape, ascend, or be devoured by the very world you sought to outsmart.

  • 🖼️ Hand-drawn CGs – Lush, painterly 2D art that blends sensuality with mystery.

  • 🧭 Branching storylines – Replay to uncover new secrets, alliances, and consequences.

This game contains adult themes, nudity, and strong sexual content. All characters are 21+ and depicted in a fantasy setting.

Clever, cocky, and utterly shameless Futa, Ella knows how to turn a situation — and a person — to her advantage. She lies with charm, seduces with purpose, and smiles through danger like it’s part of the game.

In this world, she’ll need every bit of wit (and nerve) to make it out alive.

data.short_description: A lost adventurer navigates a dangerous monster girl village, where every choice, lie, and word could mean survival—or exposure.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+, Windows 10, Windows 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics (Intel HD 3000 or better)
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Optimized for keyboard and mouse. Game includes adult content.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 (High Sierra) or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics supported
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Works on both Intel and Apple Silicon Macs (via Rosetta).

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04+, SteamOS 3.0 or compatible distro
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • 音效卡: Any
